questions.question: Describe the key differences between prescriptive and descriptive approaches to translating AI principles into practices. Provide an example of each approach (max 150 words).
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of each approach and provide a clear example

questions.question: What are the limitations of using existing frameworks and guidelines to develop AI systems for social good? Explain with reference to at least two specific examples.
questions.hint: Discuss the potential biases, lack of adaptability, and limited scope of existing frameworks

questions.question: Design a simple experiment to test the effectiveness of an AI system in addressing a specific social issue (e.g., healthcare, education, environmental sustainability). Describe the research design, sampling strategy, and metrics for evaluation (max 150 words).
questions.hint: Focus on clarity, specificity, and feasibility of the experiment
